title: Kerritamba Village Arena
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ArenaEntrance2.jpg|thumb|right|300px|The entrance to the Village Arena.]]
The '''Kerritamba Village Arena''' was an arena just across a bridge from the [[Kerritamba Village]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. One had to receive permission from [[Kerritamba|Chief Kerritamba]] to get into the arena. If the person who challenged the [[Arena Champion]] were to defeat all the arena challenges, including the champion, that individual would become the new [[Arena Champion]].

In the arena, one would face many types of non-sentient species, and if they defeated them all, only then could one move on to face the Arena Champion.

==Behind the scenes==
The Kerritamba Village Arena appeared in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''
